verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: {source} instrument sets the definitive value for the target project attribute (e.g., prime contract establishes {target} value)
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED BY: {source} instrument or procurement record is organized according to {target}, or bid type attribute
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} instrument must comply with {target} labor, regulatory, or contractual attribute
verbGlossary.COUNTED TOWARD: {source} instance contributes to the numeric total captured in {target} attribute (e.g., each subcontract counted toward subcontractor count)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} or record is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative analysis
verbGlossary.PROCURED FOR: {source} is issued specifically to fulfill {target} scope attribute (e.g., PO procured for modular/prefab content)
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} or insurance value scales proportionally with {target} financial attribute
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED WITHIN: {source} milestone falls within {target} preconstruction duration timeframe
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES: {source} scope document defines the work captured in {target} scope attribute
verbGlossary.DELINEATES: {source} explicitly separates self-performed from subcontracted work as captured by {target}
verbGlossary.WITHHELD AGAINST: {source} terms define holdback amounts calculated from {target} value attribute
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} penalty clause activates based on {target} schedule attribute
verbGlossary.BUDGETED WITHIN: {source} allowance is financially allocated within {target} contingency budget attribute
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} document is mandated because {target} attribute triggers a requirement
verbGlossary.TAILORED TO: {source}coverage is customized based on {target} type's risk profile
verbGlossary.ENCUMBERED WITHIN: {source} obligation is financially captured within {target} cost attribute
verbGlossary.CLOSES: {source}formally ends the period measured by {target} duration attribute
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source} is compared to {target}-level attribute for performance benchmarking
verbGlossary.MEASURED WITHIN: {source} cycle time metric falls within {target} duration attribute
verbGlossary.BINDS TO: {source} instrument commits the parties to {target} schedule attribute as a contractual obligation
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: {source} contractual requirement adds to {target} by requiring ongoing tracking, documentation, and compliance verification throughout the project
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINS: {source} contractual terms limit {target} by defining cash flow rules that affect when and how much money is available
